version_description: My tab is different because it is in a higher pitch than the other versions.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
Capo on 4th Fret
[Intro]
[ch]C[/ch]

[Chorus]
